Custom interfaces for adi_tmc_coe

  - ChangeCia402State
  - ChangeNMTState

|adi_tmc_coe_interfaces|
|Custom interfaces for ROS Driver for Trinamic Motor Controllers (TMC) that uses CANopen-over-etherCAT(CoE) protocol.|

|interface_name|string|Interface name, commonly starting in "en" or "eth"|
|slave_number|uint8|Slave number starting with 1 up to 255|
|motor_number|uint8|Motor number starting with 0 (for motor 0 or axis 0)|
|mode_of_operation|string|"None",  "Profile Position",   "Profile Velocity",   "Homing Mode

|**Request**|
|slave_number|uint8|Slave number of the selected device.   The count should start with "1"|1-255|
|object_name|string|Object Name of the Parameter|Check the autogenerated yaml of the used module and use the obj_name|
|value|string|When **reading**, not required|-|
|When **writing**, sh

|**Request**|
|slave_number|uint8|Slave number of the selected device.   The count should start with "1"|1-255|
|cmd|string|Commands available in PDO to **read**|When **reading**,  "modes of operation display",  "statusword",  "actual velocity",  "demand velocity",  "actual position",  "demand posit

|**Request**|
|slave_number|uint8|Slave number of the selected device.   The count should start with "1"|1-255|
|request_state|string|Requested state of the device; Check the NMT state diagram for correct sequence.|"init",  "preop",  "safeop",  "operational"|
|**Response**|
|current_state|string|Ret

|**Request**|
|slave_number|uint8|Slave number of the selected device.   The count should start with "1"|1-255|
|request_state|string|Requested CiA402 or DS402 state of the device; Check the DS402 State Diagram for correct sequence.|"switch on disable",  "ready to switch on",  "swithed on",  "operat

|**Request**|
|slave_number|uint8|Slave number of the selected device.   The count should start with "1"|1-255|
|CS_cmd|string|Cyclic Synchronous Modes|"csp" - Cyclic Synchronous Position,  "csv" - Cyclic Synchronous Velocity,  "cst" - Cyclic Synchronous Torque|
|interpolation_time_period|uint8|Sets
